seo-audit.evidence: Canonical pricing is /plans; sitemap-generator lists /plans. /pricing redirects to /plans. Persona and public pages retain meta/OG; no new SEO regressions.

cta-validator.evidence: Pricing CTAs point to /plans (UpgradePrompt, UpgradeGate, PaywallGate, SubscriptionManagement, AIToolbar, SignalErrorState). Persona pages (ForBrands, ForMedspas, ForSalons) have routes; CTAs to /request-access and /plans. No dead-end persona CTAs.

route-mapper.evidence: Single pricing path: /plans canonical, /pricing → Navigate to /plans. Orphan /home → Navigate to /intelligence. /for-medspas, /for-salons, /for-brands routed; /for-buyers → /professionals. One marketing path: /portal/marketing/* only; CrossHubActionDispatcher uses /portal/marketing/campaigns/new.

hub-shell-detector.evidence: No new shells introduced. Route cleanup only; persona pages ForMedspas, ForSalons, ForBrands remain live; public Plans and redirects do not add shell surfaces.
